ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Robert Collins appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND K. WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2019 Continued To Nov-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel R. Vos, Esq. is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-19-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court issues notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
